issues.title: about how to import in IDEA
issues.body:
can not import using maven jar in IDEA
![1](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/assets/39054457/66b688ba-fef6-4c7f-bc52-1623bae4e84a)

comments.body:
@zrmzack, 
What do you want to do? Mind that 0.7.1-SNAPSHOT is very old and many breaking changes have happened since. 
If you are starting a new project you should use the latest [0.8.1-SNAPSHOT](https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/0.8-SNAPSHOT/index.html) or at least the latest milestone release [0.8.0](https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/index.html). 
Also check the [Add Milestone and Snapshot Repositories](https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/0.8-SNAPSHOT/getting-started.html#repositories) to configure your repositories.

follow the suggestions about and the reference documentation. 
If you find any problems please reopen.
